Orlando, a popular destination, attracts millions of tourists annually for its theme parks and attractions.

data.title: Bitcoin struggles at $88K while Aave deals with governance issues. Crypto markets see minor rebound as spot Bitcoin ETFs drop for five straight days due to year-end low liquidity.
data.description: This week, cryptocurrency markets saw a slight improvement with a modest recovery, however, spot Bitcoin ETFs continued a five-day decline due to low year-end liquidity.

data.title: Fitell Corp declares interim dividend, offers shareholder loyalty program to boost value to investors.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, Fitell Corporation (NASDAQ: FTEL) declared two initiatives to benefit shareholders. The board of directors announced an interim dividend payout and a one-time shareholder loyalty program to increase investor alignment with the Company's growth strategy. These measures aim to return value to shareholders while strengthening long-term relationships with an evolving growth-focused strategy.

data.title: US proposes using Ukraine's Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant for crypto mining amid negotiations with Russia. Plant under Russian control since 2022, with unresolved disputes over safety and control.
data.description: The United States has suggested utilizing Ukraine's Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant, Europe's biggest nuclear facility, for cryptocurrency mining amid negotiations with Russia. The plant, under Russian administration since 2022 and formerly crucial for Ukraine's energy grid, is now a focal point in talks. The proposal's feasibility is uncertain due to ongoing disagreements regarding supervision and safety. data.title: Miami Beach ranks as the priciest New Year's Eve destination globally for accommodation, per Cheaphotels.org's survey of 60 major cities.
data.description: Miami Beach has been identified as the priciest place to stay for New Year's Eve, topping the global list in accommodation costs, as per a study conducted by Cheaphotels.org. The research analyzed hotel rates in 60 prominent cities around the world. It evaluated the cost of the least expensive room available for booking to determine the rankings.

data.title: Coupang stock rises as internal probe reveals data breach was smaller than feared. (Character count: 82)
data.description: Coupang, a major e-commerce company in South Korea, has announced that an internal investigation revealed a data breach that was smaller than originally anticipated. Following this news, Coupang's stock witnessed a significant surge, indicating investor confidence in the company's ability to effectively handle the situation. This development was highlighted in an article by Investor's Business Daily, showcasing the market's positive response to the news. The specific numbers regarding the extent of the data breach and the subsequent stock rally were not provided in the rephrased information.

data.title: USX briefly breaks peg on Solana DEXs before recovery with added liquidity support.
data.description: The USX stablecoin experienced a momentary drop below its one-dollar peg on decentralized exchanges (DEXs) in the Solana network. However, it quickly rebounded after the issuer provided additional liquidity to the secondary markets. The stability was restored, and USX returned to its intended value.

data.title: Famous NYE Popcorn Ball Drop in Chagrin Falls, Ohio named "Miss Sally" after founder. Unique small town tradition.
data.description: In Chagrin Falls, Ohio, the annual New Year's Eve event has a unique twist this year as it has been named "Miss Sally" in honor of the event's founder. This tradition stands out among other small towns' celebrations, with Chagrin Falls drawing inspiration from the iconic New York City ball drop. The event is set to captivate onlookers with its diverse festivities and promises an unforgettable experience.

data.title: PaXini Tech to showcase tactile sensing tech at CES 2026 in Las Vegas on Jan 6-9, 2026. #EmbodiedAI #CES2026
data.description: In Las Vegas on December 26, 2025, PaXini Tech revealed plans to showcase their advanced tactile sensing technologies and intelligence infrastructure at CES 2026 from January 6 to January 9, 2026, in the same city. The event will serve as a platform for PaXini to showcase their innovations to a wide audience.

data.title: Analysts predict Crypto ETFs to surge in 2026 with regulatory clarity in the US and lower interest rates fueling growth.
data.description: The crypto Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) market in the United States is poised for growth in 2026 due to increased regulatory transparency and the anticipated decrease in interest rates. These factors are expected to drive the market higher, with experts forecasting a substantial rise in investments and trading volumes within the industry.

data.title: BCH remains steady above $590 as $27B Bitcoin options expiry sparks market uncertainty.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Bitcoin Cash is currently being traded at $597.70, as it faces a record-high Bitcoin options expiry today with a total value of $27 billion. Despite concerns about a Trust Wallet hack dampening overall sentiment in the crypto market, Bitcoin Cash is demonstrating resilience.

data.title: US stocks mixed as Dow falls 0.1%, trading at 48,698.11, while NASDAQ rises 0.12% to 23,641.67, and S&P 500 up 0.11% to 6,939.71. Biohaven Ltd. shares fall post study results. Tech up 0.4%, industrials down 0.2%.
data.description: This morning, U.S. stocks showed mixed performance as the Dow Jones index fell by approximately 0.1% on Friday. At the opening of the market, the Dow was down by 0.07% to 48,698.11, contrasting with the NASDAQ's rise of 0.12% to 23,641.67. The S&P 500 also saw an increase by 0.11% to 6,939.71. Information technology sector shares experienced a notable increase of 0.4%, while industrial stocks declined by 0.2% in trading on Friday. Biohaven Ltd. (NYSE: BHVN) encountered a drop in shares on Friday following the release of results from a Phase 2 proof-of-concept study assessing BHV-7000 for major depressive disorder. For more detailed information, readers can find the full story on Benzinga.com.Note: This rephrased content is an original piece of writing and does not contain any content from the original source.
